entry.value: sailpoint.connector.InvalidConfigurationException: [ InvalidConfigurationException ] [ Possible suggestions ] Make sure resource mentioned in the URL is available on the ServiceNow instance. The URL resource is /api/now/v1/import/x_sapo_iiq_connect_sysuser [ Error details ] Invalid response received from ServiceNow instance. Status: 400 , Output: Invalid staging table, Detail: Specified table does not extend 'sys_import_set_row', Status: failure
